data.body: e4df r3 INDETERMINATE was a TRANSIENT LLM outage (Anthropic HTTP 520 Cloudflare origin error, retryable) — NOT a content issue; det Layer-1 mostly passed. Added file_impact (signing.py, reducer/_processors.py, opcert.py, tests) to clear det P9. Re-review r4 running buph8mud8. Note: rebase re-pushed 649/650 -> their Verified re-running on new patchsets (tickets already closed; will reconfirm green at land time).
